sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35009" key="e)narmogh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναρμογή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n35009.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fitting</tr_> of a surgical tube, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:10:19:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.19.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
